# TranscribeX

> Free AI-powered transcription tools for audio, video, and YouTube content.

TranscribeX is a free online transcription platform that uses AI to convert audio files, video files, and YouTube videos into accurate text. It supports 50+ languages, multi-speaker detection, and SRT subtitle export. No registration or credit card required.

## Tools

### Audio & Video Transcription

- [Audio to Text Converter](https://transcribex.co/audio-to-text-converter): Convert any audio file (MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG, AAC, OPUS) to text. Supports 50+ languages, speaker detection, and SRT export.
- [Video to Text Converter](https://transcribex.co/video-to-text-converter): Transcribe video files (MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WEBM, FLV) to accurate text captions and subtitles.
- [MP3 to Text](https://transcribex.co/mp3-to-text): Transcribe MP3 audio files — podcasts, interviews, voice memos — with 99.8% AI accuracy.
- [MP4 to Text](https://transcribex.co/mp4-to-text): Convert MP4 video to text transcript or SRT subtitle file. Works with screen recordings, meetings, and tutorials.
- [M4A to Text](https://transcribex.co/m4a-to-text): Convert M4A audio files (Apple Voice Memos, podcast exports) to text with AI precision.
- [WAV to Text](https://transcribex.co/wav-to-text): Transcribe WAV audio files with high accuracy. Ideal for call recordings, interviews, and academic lectures.
- [FLAC to Text](https://transcribex.co/flac-to-text): Convert lossless FLAC audio to text. Best accuracy for studio recordings and archival audio.

### YouTube Tools

- [YouTube to Text](https://transcribex.co/youtube-to-text): Paste any public YouTube URL to get a full text transcript instantly. Supports 50+ languages, multi-speaker detection, SRT subtitle export.
- [YouTube to MP4](https://transcribex.co/youtube-to-mp4): Download YouTube videos as MP4 files in up to 4K quality. Free, no watermark, no registration.
- [YouTube Downloader](https://transcribex.co/youtube-downloader): Download YouTube videos and audio in multiple formats: MP4, MP3, WEBM, M4A, OGG.

## Key Features

- AI transcription powered by Claude (Anthropic)
- 99.8% accuracy on clear audio
- 50+ supported languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Arabic, Portuguese, Turkish
- Multi-speaker detection with automatic labeling
- SRT subtitle file export with timestamps
- Maximum file size: 500 MB
- Processing is secure — files deleted after transcription
- Completely free with no registration required

## Use Cases

- Podcast transcription for show notes and SEO
- Meeting and lecture transcription for notes
- Subtitle generation for YouTube, TikTok, and social media
- Research interview transcription
- Accessibility captioning for videos
- Content repurposing from audio/video to written format
- YouTube video content extraction

## About

TranscribeX is built for content creators, journalists, researchers, students, and anyone who needs fast, accurate speech-to-text conversion. All tools are browser-based — no software download required.

Website: https://transcribex.co
Sitemap: https://transcribex.co/sitemap.xml
